battleTraits.name: Ley Lines
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.effect: Heal (1) each friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features.

battleTraits.name: Strike and Fade
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit that used a FIGHT ability this turn and is within 3" of any terrain features, roll a dice. On a 2+, remove that unit and set it up again so that each model in the unit is within 3" of any terrain features and more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Regrowth
enhancements.effect: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general, make a 2D6 casting roll. On a 5+, Heal (D6) the target.

enhancements.name: Gnarled Warrior
enhancements.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for your general.

enhancements.name: Treesong
enhancements.effect: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general, make a 2D6 casting roll. On a 7+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target unit's melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Seed of Rebirth
enhancements.effect: If your general would be destroyed, before removing them from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, your general is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on them have no effect. Then, Heal (1) your general. This unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.

regimentAbilities.name: Vengeful Spirits of the Land
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick an enemy unit contesting an objective and roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Walkers of the Hidden Paths
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features and not in combat. Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units. That unit cannot use MOVE abilities for the rest of the phase.

abilities.name: Verdurous Harmony
abilities.effect: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit, then make a casting roll of 2D6. On a 7+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If you picked a Team Tree-Revenants unit, you can return D3 slain models instead of 1.

abilities.name: Groundshaker
abilities.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice. On a 4+, the target has STRIKE-LAST this phase.

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Massive Impaling Talons is 1.

abilities.name: Envoys of the Everqueen
abilities.effect: While this unit is contesting an objective, friendly units contesting that objective have WARD (6+).

abilities.name: Martial Memories
abilities.effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply to this unit this phase: Memories of War (Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit) or Memories of Peace (Add 1 to save rolls for this unit).
